response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video contains a karaoke performance by four VTuber characters. 2. On-screen text '晴れる' and 'n-buna' identified. 3. Searched for '晴る n-buna Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Confirmed song is '晴る' (Haru) by Yorushika (n-buna is the composer). 5. Mapped scene and extracted lyrics based on verified online source.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a group of virtual characters (VTubers) having a dialogue before performing a karaoke cover of the song '晴る' (Haru) by Yorushika.

scenes.description: Virtual characters chatting in a karaoke room before singing.
Virtual characters perform a cover of the song '晴る' (Haru). Song title and composer credits appear on screen.
